channel.title: Growth on Coding notes - and snippets
channel.description: Recent content in Growth on Coding notes - and snippets

item.title: Team growth support strategies
item.description: 1. Supporting Team Members’ Growth – Real Strategies 1️⃣ Create Technical Career Paths, Not Just Tasks Recommended actions: Define clear role expectations (e.g. Junior → Senior → Staff → Principal). Make growth visible: Junior → mastering delivery + testing. Senior → owning subsystems. Staff → architecture ownership, cross-team impact. In practice: Run quarterly career conversations focused on: “What kind of engineer is the target in 12 months?” “Which architectural areas should become ownership areas?
